local remote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("AddLava")
local upgrade = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("upgrade")
local click = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Clicksound")

remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
    Leaderstats:Add(player, "lava", 1 * player.Multiplier)
end)

upgrade.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
    local price = player.UpgradePrice

    if player.lava >= 30 then
        Leaderstats:Add(player, "lava", -30)
        player.Multiplier =  player.Multiplier * 2
    end
end)

local player = Players.LocalPlayer

player.WalkSpeed = 18
print("Client script started")

local button = script.Parent
local remote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("AddLava")
local click = Workspace.Clicksound

button.Activated:Connect(function()
    click:Play()
    remote:FireServer()
end)

local button = script.Parent
local shop = PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("Shopgui")

button.Activated:Connect(function()
    shop.Visible = true
    print("Shop Opened")
end)

local button = script.Parent
local shop = PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("Shopgui")

button.Activated:Connect(function()
    shop.Visible = false
    print("Shop Closed")
end)

local button = script.Parent
local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local upgrade = ReplicatedStorage.upgrade

button.Activated:Connect(function()
    upgrade:FireServer()
end)
